formality.description: Formality is expressed through respectful particles, SRO lexical precision, and community-guided neologisms.

variables.guidance: Variables are marked with braces `{count}`. Since Cree relies heavily on affixation, suffixes must attach directly to placeholders. Use a hyphen to separate the variable from grammatical affixes (e.g., `{count}-ak` or `{count}-a` for plurals).
